prompt:
Declaration (in markdown format):

# Distributed Ralph

## Pool
- 6 implementer (`sonnet-4.6`), 1 reviewer (`opus-4.7`), max 2 per repo

## Backlog
- `fix_plan.md` in `github.com/lambda-run/ops`
- Claim: branch lock, 10m TTL
- Release on: merge, abandon, TTL expiry

## Protocol
- Conflict: last-write-wins after rebase
- Escalate after 3 rebase conflicts to reviewer pool
- Gossip claim/merge/block to `slack:#ralph-bus`

## Loop
- Continue while backlog has open tasks
- Stop if: budget > $50, kill switch, error rate > 30%

## Crash
- Release claims, requeue with retry++
- Max 3 retries, then park for human

## Observability
- Log claim/commit/fail to loki
- Metrics: success rate, p50 task seconds, claim contention
- Surface when error rate > 20% or queue stuck > 30m

## Termination
- Backlog empty, budget exhausted, or human signals done

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
• Agent pool contains 6 implementer agents
• Implementer agents run model `sonnet-4.6`
• Agent pool contains 1 reviewer agent
• Reviewer agent runs model `opus-4.7`
• Maximum 2 agents assigned per repository at any time
• Backlog source file is `fix_plan.md`
• Backlog file is located in repository `github.com/lambda-run/ops`
• Claiming a task requires acquiring a branch lock
• Branch lock TTL is 10 minutes
• Branch lock is released on task merge
• Branch lock is released on task abandon
• Branch lock is released on TTL expiry
• Conflict resolution strategy is last-write-wins after rebase
• Rebase conflict count is tracked per task
• After 3 rebase conflicts on a single task, escalate to reviewer pool
• Escalation target is the reviewer pool (the `opus-4.7` agent)
• Claim events are gossiped to `slack:#ralph-bus`
• Merge events are gossiped to `slack:#ralph-bus`
• Block events are gossiped to `slack:#ralph-bus`
• Main loop continues while backlog contains open tasks
• Main loop stops if cumulative budget exceeds $50
• Main loop stops if kill switch is activated
• Main loop stops if error rate exceeds 30%
• On crash, all held claims are released
• Crashed task is requeued with its retry counter incremented by 1
• Maximum retry count per task is 3
• After 3 retries, task is parked for human review
• Claim events are logged to Loki
• Commit events are logged to Loki
• Fail events are logged to Loki
• Metric tracked: success rate
• Metric tracked: p50 task duration in seconds
• Metric tracked: claim contention
• Alert surfaces when error rate exceeds 20%
• Alert surfaces when queue is stuck for more than 30 minutes
• System terminates when backlog is empty
• System terminates when budget is exhausted
• System terminates when a human signals done
